title: 'Dressing up defeat as agreement': Iran mocks Trump with 'negotiating with yourself' dig
summary_full: An Iranian military spokesperson has ridiculed US ceasefire efforts, dismissing Donald Trump's claims of ongoing discussions and stating Iran will never make a deal with the US. The remarks come as the US ramps up its military presence in the region, despite ongoing airstrikes and missile attacks.
